#1 JUDGE: DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PLAINTIFF (LOUIS BELMONTE) PRESENT WITH COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJE II, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD AND A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION WAS APPROVED AND SIGNED BY THE DEFT IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARR, JAMES SUED AS STAR, JAMES FRANK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET #440, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-05-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLTF. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE PLTF TO HAVE AMENDED JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE BACK RENT, DAMAGES, ATTY FEES & COSTS.
